$description: KIO Studio design tokens — W3C DTCG format. Git-canonical source of truth (DECISIONS.md D4). SEEDED placeholders: replace with real CoreMedia brand values in the brand-token phase. Built to src/styles/tokens.css by Style Dictionary.

brand.$description: KIO brand expression = the three gradient stops, used together as the app-header gradient (DECISIONS.md). Decorative/brand ONLY — functional reds/greens live under color.severity so they never read as 'brand'. PLACEHOLDER values from the current Figma 'KIO Gradient v4'; real CoreMedia values arrive in the brand-token phase (TODO.md).

red.$description: Gradient stop 1 (warm). Brand expression only — NOT the error color (that is color.severity.error).

violet.$description: Gradient stop 3 (cool); also the primary action color.

primary.$description: Primary action color — the cool end of the brand gradient.

primary-foreground.$description: Text/icon color on top of primary and on the brand gradient.

border.$description: Alias → neutral.200. Demonstrates DTCG references resolving through Style Dictionary.

severity.$description: Functional system-message colors (translated from the Figma design). Chosen to stay perceptually distinct from the brand stops — brand.red (#ff0000) is reserved for brand expression; severity.error is a separate crimson. Greyscale/black/white come from color.neutral.

error.$description: Error / danger / destructive. From the Figma notification badge.

success.$description: Success / positive / online status. From the Figma avatar online indicator.
